messages.subject: [R-gui] Dutch localisation file
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

I prepared a dutch localisation for the R-Gui, I am not sure if this  
is the right place to submit it, but the documentation pointed to  
this list.

?
Best regards,
--
Aaike De Wever
aaike at mac.com

messages.subject: [R-gui] Dutch localisation file
messages.body_plain:
On 11/28/2005 3:58 PM, Aaike De Wever wrote:
> Hello,
> 
> I prepared a dutch localisation for the R-Gui, I am not sure if this is the 
> right place to submit it, but the documentation pointed to this list.
> 

No, this list is for discussion of GUI issues: more speculative than 
day-to-day operations.  The web page

http://developer.r-project.org/Translations.html

gives instructions on preparing a translation and submitting it. I think 
yours consists of Mac-GUI translations, so it should go to the Mac-GUI 
authors:  Simon Urbanek  and Stefano Iacus (but I'm not a Mac user, so 
apologies if I've got the authorship wrong).

Duncan Murdoch
